prompt_template_or_instruction_summary: Appends length-control instruction: Think for maximum N tokens, with boxed final answer style.
budget_handling: token_budget mapped to actions via token_per_action; control_mode=max
answer_extraction: extract_final_answer + numeric normalization in evaluation scripts
notes: Behavior-level L1-style adapter; not RL/post-training reproduction by repo docs.

prompt_template_or_instruction_summary: Injects per-instance budget line: use less than {budget} tokens; budget estimator char_length_linear.
budget_handling: token_budget_default/min/max + token_budget_per_question_char; converted to action budget
answer_extraction: extract_final_answer + numeric normalization in evaluation scripts
notes: TALE-style prompt-budgeting MODE A adapter; TALE-PT/full path marked separate in docs.

prompt_template_or_instruction_summary: When branch ends early, reopen and append "Wait (forced-continue)" up to num_ignore_think_end.
number_of_calls_per_case: 1 generator loop + forced continuation events within same run
budget_handling: action budget with num_ignore_think_end/min_thinking_steps control knobs
answer_extraction: extract_final_answer + numeric normalization in evaluation scripts
notes: Behavior-level s1-style inference adapter; docs explicitly disclaim full s1/s1.1 reproduction.

controller_or_runner: Offline row-wise oracle over external_l1/tale/s1 correctness columns

notes: Not a deployable baseline; evaluation upper bound only.
